items.name: Wheel Highway
items.weight: Jack of All Treads Tire Pack Weight (S / D)

items.For Scouts Templates: The chart was originally lifted wholesale from this chart by bladechildx, rearranged for convenience and expanded with width and softness data
Asphalt, ground/rock and mud/snow values are friction coefficient for that type of surface
Width is defined for each wheel at radius of 1 meter and scaled down with it
Softness either template or custom values which correspond to radius offset and force scale respectively
Purple colored cells indicate tires belonging to a DLC vehicle
UHD and UOD tires on Ford F 750 have width of 0,546 in the front and 1,158 in the rear
ATHS / OHS / MHS I / DMHS tires on ZiKZ 612H have width of 0,75
Burlak 6x6 Tires prevent slipping on ice and icy roads, similar to chained tires
